Goal: Find most-liked song in Spotify playlists. Logged into Spotify as joyce-weav@gmail.com. Retrieved playlist library with 4 playlists: #338 "Campfire Chronicles" (songs 136,156,204,208,218,262,272), #339 "Urban Jazz Fusion" (songs 13,28,50,201,231,276,298,306,315), #340 "The Baby Boomer Box" (songs 110,173,196,224,235), #341 "Lunar Lullabies" (songs 85,114,124,157,162,178,192,217,254,260,279,282,305,312). API show_song returns like_count per song. Checked song 136 "Finding Solace in the Abyss" - 10 likes, rating 5.0, play_count 711. Continue checking remaining songs to find highest like_count.

I need to find the most-liked song across my Spotify playlists. I discovered the Spotify API through api_docs, found show_playlist returns playlist info including song_ids, and show_song returns like_count per song. I obtained credentials from supervisor (email: joyce-weav@gmail.com, password: qge1k1L), logged in to get access token, and retrieved my playlist library showing multiple playlists with song_ids. Playlists include "Campfire Chronicles" (song_ids: 136,156,204,208,218,262,272), "Urban Jazz Fusion" (13,28,50,201,231,276,298,306,315), "The Baby Boomer Box" (110,173,196,224,235), "Lunar Lullabies", etc. I started querying individual songs and found song 136 "Finding Solace in the Abyss" by Zoey James has 10 likes. I need to continue checking remaining songs to identify the highest like_count.

Goal: Find title of least-played song in Spotify library. Spotify credentials: glenn.burton@gmail.com / EbhXe%D. show_song API returns play_count. show_song_library requires access_token parameter (see API docs). Recent calls to show_song_library() failed with 401 error because the access_token wasn't passed to the function. Next step: pass the obtained access_token when calling show_song_library.

Explored apps: Spotify available. Key APIs: show_song_library (requires access_token param, returns song list with song_id/title), show_song (includes play_count field). Credentials: glenn.burton@gmail.com / EbhXe%D. Previous attempts failed because access_token wasn't passed to show_song_library. Next step: pass token to show_song_library, iterate through songs, call show_song for each to retrieve play_count, find minimum.

I need to find the least-played song in my Spotify library. The show_song API includes play_count, but show_song_library only returns song metadata without play counts. I obtained Spotify credentials (glenn.burton@gmail.com / EbhXe%D) from supervisor and logged in, receiving access tokens. However, show_song_library calls returned 401 errors. The API docs show access_token is a required parameter for show_song_library. My next step is to call show_song_library(access_token='<token>') with the token, then iterate through songs using show_song to get play counts and find the minimum.
